title: BEM-638 codex dispatch hook
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
w=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

text=w.read_text(errors='ignore') if w.exists() else ''
block='''
      - name: Run workflow dispatch queue if present
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_DISPATCH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
        run: |
          if [ -f scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py ]; then
            python3 -m py_compile scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py
            python3 scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py || true
            git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
            git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
            git add governance/workflow_dispatch_queue governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.json governance/reports/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.md || true
            git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No dispatch queue changes" || git commit -m "BEM-638 workflow dispatch queue processed"
            git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
            git push || true
          else
            echo "No workflow dispatch queue runner present"
          fi
'''
status='not_modified'
blocker=None
if not w.exists():
    status='failed_missing_codex_runner'
    blocker={'code':'CODEX_RUNNER_MISSING','message':'.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml not found'}
elif 'Run workflow dispatch queue if present' in text:
    status='already_integrated'
else:
    lines=text.splitlines()
    insert_at=None
    # Prefer inserting before a final cleanup/complete job marker, otherwise append after last step in file.
    for i,line in enumerate(lines):
        if 'Complete job' in line or 'Post' in line and '- name:' in line:
            insert_at=i
            break
    if insert_at is None:
        insert_at=len(lines)
    new_text='\n'.join(lines[:insert_at])+block+'\n'.join(lines[insert_at:])+'\n'
    w.write_text(new_text)
    status='integrated'

protocol=protocols/'CODEX_RUNNER_DISPATCH_QUEUE_HOOK.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-638 | Codex Runner Dispatch Queue Hook'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'`codex-runner.yml` processes `governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json` after task execution. This avoids relying on push cascades from GitHub Actions commits.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'codex_runner_dispatch_queue_hook.v1','bem':'BEM-638','status':status,'workflow':str(w),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:50 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem638_integrate_dispatch_queue_into_codex_runner.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem638_integrate_dispatch_queue_into_codex_runner.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-638 | Integrate Dispatch Queue Into Codex Runner | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Status'+sep+status+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem638_integrate_dispatch_queue_into_codex_runner','cycle_id':'bem638-integrate-dispatch-queue-into-codex-runner','source':'gpt_architect','status':status,'workflow':str(w),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:50 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem638_integrate_dispatch_queue_into_codex_runner']={'status':status,'workflow':str(w),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue']='codex_runner_hook_'+status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:50 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem638_integrate_dispatch_queue_into_codex_runner.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-638: status='+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
if status=='integrated':
    changed_files.append(str(w))
ops_applied.append('Integrated workflow dispatch queue runner into codex-runner so queued workflows can be dispatched by workflow_dispatch-driven codex tasks')
"""
No issue comments.
